title: SimpleTPA
description: This is a Minecraft plugin which allows players to send teleport requests to each other.
body:
This is a Minecraft plugin which allows players to send teleport requests to each other.

**What's New in Version 1.1.0:**
- /tpahere command - Request another player to teleport to you (reverse TPA)
- /tpatoggle command - Block all incoming teleport requests
- Cooldown system - Configurable delay between TPA requests to prevent spam
- Teleport delay - Warmup period before teleportation with actionbar countdown
- Movement & damage cancellation - Teleport cancelled if player moves or takes damage during warmup
- Customizable sound effects - Configure sounds for requests, accepts, and denies

**Commands:**
- /tpa <player> - Send a teleport request to another player
- /tpahere <player> - Request another player to teleport to you
- /tpaccept - Accept an incoming teleport request
- /tpdeny - Deny an incoming teleport request
- /tpacancel - Cancel your outgoing teleport request
- /tpatoggle - Toggle receiving teleport requests on/off
- /tpareload - Reload the plugin configuration

**Permissions:**
- SimpleTPA.tpa - Allows using teleport request commands (default: true)
- SimpleTPA.reload - Allows reloading the plugin configuration (default: op)

**Features:**
- Simple and intuitive teleport request system
- TPA and TPAHere modes for flexible teleportation
- Configurable request timeout (default 60 seconds)
- Teleport warmup/delay to prevent combat abuse
- Cooldown system to prevent request spam
- Cancel pending requests at any time
- Privacy mode with /tpatoggle
- Movement and damage detection during warmup
- Actionbar countdown display
- Automatic cleanup of expired requests
- Sound effects on successful teleportation, accepts, denies
- Full color code support for all messages
- Detailed logging options for server administrators

**Important when updating:**
If you are upgrading from an older version, delete the existing `config.yml` in the plugin folder before restarting the server. This ensures the new default configuration and message keys are applied and prevents conflicts.

Just send me a message on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/vVrpvBEfeQ) if you have any questions, suggestions, or requests for new plugins.
